heading: About Rob
bio: I'm Rob, and you'll find me on the floor at Hardcore Fitness in Winter Garden. I've been coaching since 2015, and I got into it because I kept seeing the same thing: people showing up with real motivation, then drifting away because nobody showed them what to do with it. That's the part I care about fixing.

Most of the people I work with aren't athletes. They're busy, they've had a rough run with fitness before, or they just don't want to walk in and look lost. My job is to take that off your plate. You show up, I'll handle the plan.

What I won't do is hand you something you'll quit in three weeks. We'll work with the schedule you actually have and the body you actually have today, and adjust as those change. Progress you keep beats progress you burn out chasing.
imageAlt: Rob resting between sets in the gym
